title: WunderGraph Cosmo Subgraph
description: A Subgraph is an isolated GraphQL schema that can be independently deployed and managed, composing into federated graphs via label matching.

namespace.description: The namespace the subgraph belongs to.

routingUrl.description: The URL where the subgraph service is hosted.

labels.description: Labels attached to the subgraph for matching to federated graphs.

subscriptionUrl.description: URL for WebSocket-based GraphQL subscriptions if different from the routing URL.

lastPublishedAt.description: When the schema was last published.

updatedAt.description: When the subgraph was last updated.
